title: ReferenceSuiteConfig
description: Schema for the reference-suite configuration that lists canonical SWF traces used for evaluation and benchmarking.

suite_id.description: Unique identifier for this suite of reference traces.

traces.description: Ordered list of trace entries in the reference suite.

id.description: Short human-readable identifier for the trace.

filename.description: Name of the SWF file (may include .gz suffix).

source.description: URL or URI where the original trace can be downloaded.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the file for integrity verification.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the trace.

num_jobs.description: Expected number of jobs in the trace (informational).

num_processors.description: Number of processors in the originating system.

time_range.description: Calendar date range covered by the trace.
